samples.gvd:
module counter_12(
    input rst_n,
    input clk,
    input valid_count,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if (valid_count) begin
        if (out == 4'd11) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state">
            <item value="4'd0">Idle</item>
            <item value="4'd1">Counting</item>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="logic">
            <input_ref id="clk"/>
            <input_ref id="valid_count"/>
            <output_ref id="out"/>
            <state id="state_0" value="'d0"/>
            <state id="state_1" value="'d1"/>
            <case>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <op id="&&">
                            <input_ref id="rst_n"/>
                            <op id="!">
                                <input_ref id="clk"/>
                            </op>
                        </op>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign id="out">
                            <value>4'b0000</value>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <condition>
                        <op id="&&">
                            <input_ref id="valid_count"/>
                            <op id="!">
                                <input_ref id="rst_n"/>
                            </op>
                        </op>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <op id="if">
                            <op id="==">
                                <output_ref id="out"/>
                                <value>4'd11</value>
                            </op>
                            <action>
                                <assign id="out">
                                    <value>4'b0000</value>
                                </assign>
                            </action>
                            <action>
                                <assign id="out">
                                    <op id="+">
                                        <output_ref id="out"/>
                                        <value>4'b0001</value>
                                    </op>
                                </assign>
                            </action>
                        </op>
                    </action>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
</module>
